rationale: Increasing the homestead exemption reduces local property tax revenue for school districts, affecting the commissioner's state and local funding per-student determinations under §48.010(a). No statutory amendment needed, but rulemaking must account for reduced local revenue.
quote: the commissioner shall determine for each school district whether the estimated amount of state and local funding per student in weighted average daily attendance to be provided to the district under the Foundation School Program for maintenance and operations for the following school year is less than the amount provided to the district for the 2010-2011 school year
